description:
Create a new Incident Template in ServiceDesk Plus named 'Network Outage Report'. Log in as 'administrator' with password 'administrator'.

Configure the template with the following details:
- Name: Network Outage Report
- Subject: Network Outage - [Location]
- Description: Must include the text: "Affected location/floor:", "Number of users impacted:", "Time outage was first noticed:", and "Symptoms observed:"
- Priority: High
- Urgency: High
- Impact: High (or 'Affects Business')
- Category: Network
